name: qunta
description: Qunta desktop coding-agent product with Tauri, Rust, Codex, and private LLM gateway.

scripts.typecheck: node tools/check-workspace-layout.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/shared-types typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/ui typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/desktop typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/desktop-ui typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/llm-gateway typecheck
scripts.test: node tools/check-task-queue.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/shared-types test && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/ui test && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/desktop-ui test && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @qunta/llm-gateway test
scripts.check: corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm test
